# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  Vpc:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: '10.0.0.0/16'
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      CidrBlock: '10.0.1.0/24'
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 0, !GetAZs ]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      CidrBlock: '10.0.2.0/24'
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 1, !GetAZs ]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      CidrBlock: '10.0.3.0/24'
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 0, !GetAZs ]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      CidrBlock: '10.0.4.0/24'
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [ 1, !GetAZs ]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false

  InternetGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::InternetGateway'

  VpcGatewayAttachment:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::RouteTable'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc

  PublicRoute:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Route'
    DependsOn: VpcGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::RouteTable'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc

  PrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::RouteTable'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref Vpc

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    DependsOn: PublicRoute
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    DependsOn: PublicRoute
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    DependsOn: PrivateRouteTable1
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    DependsOn: PrivateRouteTable2
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2

  NatGateway1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::NatGateway'
    DependsOn: VpcGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt PublicSubnet1.EgressOnlyInternetGatewayAttribute
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1

  NatGateway2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::NatGateway'
    DependsOn: VpcGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt PublicSubnet2.EgressOnlyInternetGatewayAttribute
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2

  PrivateRouteTable1Route:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Route'
    DependsOn: NatGateway1
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway1

  PrivateRouteTable2Route:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Route'
    DependsOn: NatGateway2
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: '0.0.0.0/0'
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway2

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: The ID of the VPC.
    Value: !Ref Vpc
